evals.prompt:
토스증권 서버 개발자 JD 기반으로 이력서 리뷰해줘.

JD 핵심:
- Java/Kotlin, Spring Framework, Redis, Kafka
- 대용량 트래픽, 동시성 처리, 실시간 데이터 처리
- 유실없는 데이터 정합성과 신뢰성
- 트러블슈팅, 성능 튜닝

이력서는 _config.yml에 있어.
evals.expected_output: Self-introduction type-based evaluation (A/B/C/D + global), D1c-D6c career, D1p-D6p problem-solving, P.A.R.R., JD keyword matching, Type C guidance with research suggestion, AI Tone Audit

assertions.description: Checks other branches' _config.yml patterns before evaluation
Each self-intro paragraph is identified by type (A/B/C/D) and evaluated against type-specific criteria — NOT S1-S5 codes
Global criteria (paragraph count, independence, first sentence, original framing) are evaluated after per-type evaluation
Output uses Type A/B/C/D codes — no S1, S2, S3, S4, S5 codes appear anywhere
When Type C is absent/needed for targeting, suggests researching the company (product, tech blog, career page) before writing — or offers option to omit Type C
After findings, presents concrete actionable options (2-3 choices with trade-offs) rather than just listing problems
Type D (current interest) paragraph is NOT failed for lacking metrics — direction and specificity are sufficient
Does not quote JD keywords back at the company in self-intro suggestions
Distinguishes weak matches from strong matches in JD keyword analysis
Career bullets evaluated with D1c-D6c codes
Problem-solving entries evaluated with D1p-D6p codes
Career bullets get D5c (Hook Potential) as actual evaluation
Problem-solving entries get D5p (Interview Depth) evaluation
Output includes separate career and problem-solving summary count lines
Does not flag career bullets for lacking corresponding problem-solving entries
Performs AI Tone Audit as final step

evals.prompt: 이력서 봐줘. 전반적으로 피드백 부탁해. _config.yml에 있어.
evals.expected_output: Self-introduction type-based evaluation (A/B/D + global, no Type C since no target), D1c-D6c career, D1p-D6p problem-solving, P.A.R.R., AI Tone Audit.

assertions.description: Each self-intro paragraph identified by type and evaluated against type-specific criteria
Global criteria evaluated after per-type
No S1-S5 codes in output
Absence of Type C noted as normal (no target company) — not flagged as a problem
Type D paragraph not failed for lacking metrics
Concrete options offered after findings
Career bullets evaluated with D1c-D6c
Problem-solving entries evaluated with D1p-D6p
Separate career and problem-solving summary counts
Sections treated as independent
AI Tone Audit as final step

benchmark_history.notes: s3-s4-na and no-company-specific-content assertions were design issues, not skill issues

benchmark_history.changes: D5 career exclusion, section independence, English language consistency
D1-D6 split to D1c-D6c/D1p-D6p, S1-S5 replaced with Type A-D + global evaluation
